creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
dns/c-ares port has been updated and changed and libcares version
	has too. This breaks ftp/curl, when compiled with CARES version
	turned on.

Fix: Remove the shlib version from ftp/curl, since the port actually doesn't
	mind the bump.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to make 'ftp/curl' with CARES option turned on.
